query:
insert or replace into TracesCoveredByFailedTests (
                last_collect_nr,
                product_id,
                filepath,
                file_hash,
                traced_line
            )
            select distinct
                last_collect_nr,
                product_id,
                filepath,
                file_hash,
                traced_line
            from TraceMappedLinesCoveredByFailedTests
            where last_collect_nr = $1 and product_id = $2
